# Booltools SEO Crawler

> Free, open-source website auditor for SEO and AI search readiness. Analyzes websites for 130+ checks across technical SEO, on-page optimization, performance, security, structured data, and generative engine optimization (GEO).

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://booltools.github.io/booltools-seo-crawler/docs/getting-started.html): Installation and setup guide
- [Web UI Guide](https://booltools.github.io/booltools-seo-crawler/docs/web-ui.html): Using the web interface
- [CI/CD SDK](https://booltools.github.io/booltools-seo-crawler/docs/sdk.html): Integrate SEO checks into deployment pipelines
- [Rules Reference](https://booltools.github.io/booltools-seo-crawler/docs/rules.html): All 130+ audit rules with examples
- [Rule Presets](https://booltools.github.io/booltools-seo-crawler/docs/presets.html): Pre-configured rule sets for different site types
- [API Reference](https://booltools.github.io/booltools-seo-crawler/docs/api.html): REST API endpoints
- [Localhost Crawling](https://booltools.github.io/booltools-seo-crawler/docs/localhost.html): Testing local development servers

## Key Features

- 130+ audit rules across 15 categories
- GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) — AI crawler access, llms.txt, content citability
- Real-time progress via Server-Sent Events
- CI/CD SDK for catching SEO regressions in pull requests
- GitHub Action available on the Marketplace
- Export reports as CSV or Markdown
- Docker deployment support

## Technology

- Backend: Go, Chi router, Colly crawler, Goquery
- Frontend: Astro SSR
- Database: SQLite (WAL mode)
- SDK: Standalone Go CLI binary

## Links

- Source Code: https://github.com/booltools/booltools-seo-crawler
- GitHub Action: https://github.com/marketplace/actions/booltools-seo-crawler
- License: MIT
